episodes.title: Fanum Tax: Who Really Pays for Free Content
episodes.description: The fanum tax explained as actual economics: attention as currency, the hidden cost of 'free', and the fair-pay receipts behind every drop we make.

episodes.title: Ohio Final Boss: A Brainrot Field Guide
episodes.description: A taxonomy of every cursed creature in the feed — from the Gigachad to the Skibidi — and a survival map for getting out of Ohio with your frontal lobe intact.

episodes.title: NPC Streams & the Death of the Self
episodes.description: Gyatt. Ice cream so good. We unpack the NPC livestream economy, parasocial tipping loops, and what it means when people pay you to act like a vending machine.

episodes.title: Sigma Grindset vs. Touch Grass Protocol
episodes.description: The 4am cold-shower sigma pipeline gets a peer review. We separate the genuinely useful habits from the engagement-farming cope — then send everyone outside.

episodes.title: Your FYP Is Cooked
episodes.description: Skibidi Toilet ate your attention span. We fight back with stats on doomscrolling, the dopamine hijack, and how to hack the algorithm without selling your soul.

episodes.title: Rizz Recession: The Great Gyatt Collapse
episodes.description: Ohio-level economics meets terminal brainrot. We chart the collapse of rizz futures, why mewing won't save the market, and the secretly wholesome lesson hiding in the chaos.

episodes.title: Pilot: How We Got Cooked
episodes.description: The origin drop. Why a secretly-ethical media empire decided to fight brainrot with brainrot — and the manifesto that kicked the whole conspiracy off.
